title: [CI:DOCS] uidmap man pages: fix corrupt tables
body:
The markdown-to-manpage sequence needs a long row of dashes, not a single dash. A single dash, as used in this one option, generates unreadable *roff.

Also, some tool somewhere doesn't like too-long columns. Shrtn thm.

Also, verify that there are no more three-or-fewer-dash columns:

    $ ack '\|\s+-{1,3}\s' docs/source/markdown

Fixes: #19086

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>

```release-note
Fixes corrupt uidmap tables in podman-create(1) and -run(1)
```

comments.body: Good candidate for backporting if it's not too late
